name: codex-local-search-adapter
description: Free local web-search adapter for Codex OSS/local-provider runs.

scripts.check: node --check src/local-searchd.mjs && node --check src/local-search-cli.mjs && node --check src/local-search-mcp.mjs
scripts.smoke: node src/local-searchd.mjs --smoke && node src/local-search-cli.mjs --smoke && node src/local-search-mcp.mjs --smoke
